identified_risks.description: T3 (GLM hookup) is critical priority but cannot start until T2 (API endpoints) is completed; T2 is only 50% done.
identified_risks.impact: Critical path is blocked; T3's 8 estimated hours cannot begin, cascading delays to downstream integration and testing.
identified_risks.recommended_action: Prioritize Alice to focus exclusively on completing T2 API endpoints, then immediately transition to T3 GLM hookup to unblock the critical path.

identified_risks.description: 22 of 28 estimated hours remain with only 8 days left; current daily completion rate of ~0.86 hrs/day is far below the required 2.75 hrs/day.
identified_risks.impact: At current pace, only ~46% of total project work will be completed by the Nov 25 deadline, leaving critical and high-priority deliverables unfinished.
identified_risks.recommended_action: Reallocate all members to parallelize work: Bob starts T4 React UI immediately using mocked API responses, Carol begins T5 report draft with available schema docs, while Alice finishes T2/T3.

identified_risks.description: T3 'GLM hookup' lacks specification on which GLM model, integration method, expected I/O format, and acceptance criteria.
identified_risks.impact: Without clear requirements, implementation may diverge from expectations, requiring costly rework and further delaying the critical path.
identified_risks.recommended_action: Schedule an immediate requirements clarification session to define GLM model version, API contract, response schema, and acceptance criteria before T3 development begins.

identified_risks.description: T4 (React UI) and T5 (Write report) are at 0% completion with no visible artifacts, wireframes, or outlines started.
identified_risks.impact: Late starts on these tasks compress available time for iteration and review, increasing likelihood of low-quality deliverables or incomplete submissions.
identified_risks.recommended_action: Have Bob create initial React UI component scaffolding with mock data, and Carol produce a report outline and draft introduction based on completed DB schema work.

identified_risks.description: Carol has the lowest contribution score (0.3) and was last active 1 day ago while her assigned task T5 remains at 0%.
identified_risks.impact: Underutilization of Carol delays documentation deliverables and creates uneven workload distribution across the team.
identified_risks.recommended_action: Assign Carol a concrete first deliverable for T5 (report outline by end of day) and check in on any blockers preventing her contribution.

inactive_members.recommended_action: Engage Carol immediately with a specific T5 deliverable (report outline) and verify no blockers exist; her documentation skills are needed now to parallelize work.
